data.title: Musk Ready To Ban Daylight Saving Time With D.O.G.E.: 'Looks Like The People Want To Abolish The Annoying Time Changes!'

data.title: French Government Collapses After Vote Of No Confidence
data.description: The French government collapsed on Wednesday following a successful no-confidence vote, throwing France, the eurozone's second-largest economy, into political turmoil.
